message:
fix(sync): include tombstones in auto-flush full export

getIssuesToExport used default IssueFilter (IncludeTombstones=false) for
full exports, silently dropping tombstones from JSONL. This broke
tombstone propagation across clones - deleted issues could reappear
after a full auto-flush cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
